# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

Every HTML page below has a parallel markdown representation at `<page-url>index.md`,
served by GitHub Pages with `Content-Type: text/markdown; charset=utf-8`. Agents
that prefer markdown can fetch those URLs directly or follow the
`<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` advertised in each page's `<head>`.

## About
- [Home]({{ site.url }}/) (md: {{ site.url }}/index.md)
- [Work Experience]({{ site.url }}/work/) (md: {{ site.url }}/work/index.md)
- [Blog]({{ site.url }}/blog/) (md: {{ site.url }}/blog/index.md)
- [Books]({{ site.url }}/books/) (md: {{ site.url }}/books/index.md)
- [Tags]({{ site.url }}/tags/) (md: {{ site.url }}/tags/index.md)
- [Resume/CV]({{ site.url }}/assets/resume/CV.pdf)

## Blog Posts
{% for post in site.posts %}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}) (md: {{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}index.md): {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | truncatewords: 20 }}
{% endfor %}

## Books
{% for book in site.books %}
- [{{ book.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ book.web_url }}) (md: {{ site.url }}{{ book.url }}index.md)
{% endfor %}
